title: phlomis herba-venti var. pungens
intro: Phlomis herba-venti var. pungens, also known as Jerusalem sage or Phlomis, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its aromatic leaves and spikes of purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phlomis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote respiratory health. Phlomis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
